---
title: "test.ts"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\test.ts"
loc: 10
complexity: 2
logic_score: 8.00
style_score: 8.00
intel_score: 8.00
overall_score: 8.00
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Import and utilize via the standard project structure.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 8.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 8.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: undefined interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
Minimal internal dependencies.

### Exports
Internal logic only.
